detail_text: Biofinest Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement - Zeaxanthin Bilberry Eyebright Goji Berry Vitamin C E Zinc - Enhanced Absorption Healthy Lens Macula Retina Vision Clarity UV Blue light Dry Eye Fatigue Digital Strain Protection - Blackcurrant Flavor (60 Gummies) Biofinest Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement is formulated to enhance your eye health and provide a wide range of benefits. With a potent blend of lutein, zeaxanthin, bilberry, eyebright, goji berry, vitamin C, and vitamin E, along with zinc, this gummy supplement offers a comprehensive solution to support and protect your vision. ✅Enhanced Blue Light Protection: In today's digital age, we are exposed to more blue light from screens than ever before. Zeaxanthin in the supplement helps filter and reduce the damage caused by blue light, making it an excellent choice for individuals who spend a significant amount of time on computers or other devices. ✅Reduced Eye Fatigue: With the increasing prevalence of screen time, many people experience eye strain and fatigue. The natural ingredients in these gummies, including goji berry and bilberry, can help reduce eye fatigue, allowing you to work, read, or enjoy digital content more comfortably. ✅Improved Night Vision: Bilberry is known for its positive impact on night vision. By enhancing your ability to see in low-light conditions, this supplement can be especially beneficial for nighttime drivers and individuals who enjoy evening activities. ✅Multi-Faceted Eye Care: Biofinest's formula covers a wide range of aspects of eye care, from reducing the risk of age-related eye conditions to relieving immediate discomfort. This multi-faceted approach ensures comprehensive support for your eye health. ✅Eye Health Enhancement: Biofinest's Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement contains lutein and zeaxanthin, essential carotenoids that are known to protect the retina and filter harmful UV rays. These ingredients contribute to the overall health and functioning of your eyes, reducing the risk of age-related vision issues. ✅Antioxidant Power: With added vitamins C and E, this supplement packs a powerful antioxidant punch. Antioxidants combat free radicals that can cause oxidative stress in the eyes, helping to prevent cataracts and other eye-related diseases. ✅Bilberry and Goji Berry: Bilberry is renowned for its role in improving night vision, while goji berries are packed with nutrients that support eye health. These natural ingredients contribute to clearer and sharper vision. ✅Eyebright for Soothing: Eyebright, a herb used for centuries to soothe eye irritation and reduce inflammation, is an important ingredient. It can help alleviate symptoms like dryness and redness, making your eyes feel more comfortable. ✅Vitamin C and Zinc: Vitamin C and zinc are known to support the immune system. A strong immune system can help reduce the risk of eye infections, ensuring your eyes remain healthy and free from common issues. ✅Convenient Tasty Fruit Gummy Form: Biofinest's Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement comes in a convenient gummy form, making it easy to incorporate into your daily routine. They're a tasty and enjoyable way to take care of your eye health without the need for large pills or capsules. Why Choose Biofinest's Gummies: -Gummies are made with pectin (plant based), not gelatin (animal based), and sweetened with organic tapioca syrup and beet sugar. Healthier choice with lower calories, 50% less sweet lower sugar (0.8g/ gummy), as compared with other brands (between 1-3g per gummy). -Made in USA premium quality, sustainably sourced from trusted origin, formulated with high strength pure natural ingredients for optimal absorption. We use custom formulation to integrate all the best ingredients for your maximum health benefits. -Big bottle for huge value for money, best savings per gummy. Direct USA manufacturer. That’s how we keep the price low for premium products. Quality products at a fraction of the going price. -Pure, gelatin-free, gluten-Free, non-GMO, vegan, unfiltered, 3rd party lab tested, GMP/FDA registered facility. -Double layer airtight sealed to ensure product authenticity, maximum protection and prolonged freshness. Industry grade bottle packaging to protect the supplement against any exposure to moisture. -Easy to use press-turn bottle cap for daily use; long expiry date, convenience to carry around. -Delicious, natural fruity soft chew gummy form, no oversize capsules, no aftertaste. Suggested Use: -As a dietary supplement, chew 1-2 gummies a day, or as directed by a health professional. No food or water needed. -Storage: Store in a cool dry place. Close tight after opening. -Gummy colors may change over time due to natural colors. Any clouding of the bottle is normal. Being naturally extracted, ingredients used in different batches or seasons will affect the taste, texture, density and coloration of the product. All these do not affect the quality and efficacy of the product.
detail_html:
Biofinest Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement - Zeaxanthin Bilberry Eyebright Goji Berry Vitamin C E Zinc - Enhanced Absorption Healthy Lens Macula Retina Vision Clarity UV Blue light Dry Eye Fatigue Digital Strain Protection - Blackcurrant Flavor (60 Gummies)

Biofinest Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement is formulated to enhance your eye health and provide a wide range of benefits. With a potent blend of lutein, zeaxanthin, bilberry, eyebright, goji berry, vitamin C, and vitamin E, along with zinc, this gummy supplement offers a comprehensive solution to support and protect your vision. 

✅Enhanced Blue Light Protection: In today's digital age, we are exposed to more blue light from screens than ever before. Zeaxanthin in the supplement helps filter and reduce the damage caused by blue light, making it an excellent choice for individuals who spend a significant amount of time on computers or other devices.

✅Reduced Eye Fatigue: With the increasing prevalence of screen time, many people experience eye strain and fatigue. The natural ingredients in these gummies, including goji berry and bilberry, can help reduce eye fatigue, allowing you to work, read, or enjoy digital content more comfortably.

✅Improved Night Vision: Bilberry is known for its positive impact on night vision. By enhancing your ability to see in low-light conditions, this supplement can be especially beneficial for nighttime drivers and individuals who enjoy evening activities.

✅Multi-Faceted Eye Care: Biofinest's formula covers a wide range of aspects of eye care, from reducing the risk of age-related eye conditions to relieving immediate discomfort. This multi-faceted approach ensures comprehensive support for your eye health.

✅Eye Health Enhancement: Biofinest's Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement contains lutein and zeaxanthin, essential carotenoids that are known to protect the retina and filter harmful UV rays. These ingredients contribute to the overall health and functioning of your eyes, reducing the risk of age-related vision issues.

✅Antioxidant Power: With added vitamins C and E, this supplement packs a powerful antioxidant punch. Antioxidants combat free radicals that can cause oxidative stress in the eyes, helping to prevent cataracts and other eye-related diseases.

✅Bilberry and Goji Berry: Bilberry is renowned for its role in improving night vision, while goji berries are packed with nutrients that support eye health. These natural ingredients contribute to clearer and sharper vision.

✅Eyebright for Soothing: Eyebright, a herb used for centuries to soothe eye irritation and reduce inflammation, is an important ingredient. It can help alleviate symptoms like dryness and redness, making your eyes feel more comfortable.

✅Vitamin C and Zinc: Vitamin C and zinc are known to support the immune system. A strong immune system can help reduce the risk of eye infections, ensuring your eyes remain healthy and free from common issues.

✅Convenient Tasty Fruit Gummy Form: Biofinest's Lutein Eye Gummy Supplement comes in a convenient gummy form, making it easy to incorporate into your daily routine. They're a tasty and enjoyable way to take care of your eye health without the need for large pills or capsules.

Why Choose Biofinest's Gummies:

-Gummies are made with pectin (plant based), not gelatin (animal based), and sweetened with organic tapioca syrup and beet sugar. Healthier choice with lower calories, 50% less sweet lower sugar (0.8g/ gummy), as compared with other brands (between 1-3g per gummy). 

-Made in USA premium quality, sustainably sourced from trusted origin, formulated with high strength pure natural ingredients for optimal absorption. We use custom formulation to integrate all the best ingredients for your maximum health benefits.

-Big bottle for huge value for money, best savings per gummy. Direct USA manufacturer. That’s how we keep the price low for premium products. Quality products at a fraction of the going price.

-Pure, gelatin-free, gluten-Free, non-GMO, vegan, unfiltered, 3rd party lab tested, GMP/FDA registered facility.

-Double layer airtight sealed to ensure product authenticity, maximum protection and prolonged freshness. Industry grade bottle packaging to protect the supplement against any exposure to moisture. 

-Easy to use press-turn bottle cap for daily use; long expiry date, convenience to carry around.

-Delicious, natural fruity soft chew gummy form, no oversize capsules, no aftertaste.

Suggested Use:

-As a dietary supplement, chew 1-2 gummies a day, or as directed by a health professional. No food or water needed. 

-Storage: Store in a cool dry place. Close tight after opening.

-Gummy colors may change over time due to natural colors. Any clouding of the bottle is normal. Being naturally extracted, ingredients used in different batches or seasons will affect the taste, texture, density and coloration of the product. All these do not affect the quality and efficacy of the product.

title: Nutra Zenith Astaxanthin 15mg Supplement with Omega-3 Lutein Vitamin E - Antioxidant for Eye Health, Skin Care & Immune Support - 60 Softgels
detail_text: Astaxanthin VitaRadiance: Nature's Most Powerful Antioxidant UNMATCHED ANTIOXIDANT PROTECTION Astaxanthin is a rare and powerful carotenoid that can protect both water and fat-soluble portions of cells. Research shows it's up to 6,000 times more potent than vitamin C and can cross the blood-brain and blood-retinal barriers. THE NUTRA ZENITH DIFFERENCE While many competitors offer weak formulas (some containing less than 1mg despite label claims), our VitaRadiance delivers 15mg of laboratory-verified astaxanthin in each serving with Piperine to enhance absorption by up to 30%. COMPREHENSIVE BEAUTY & WELLNESS FORMULA: 15mg Natural Astaxanthin from premium microalgae 100mg Omega-3 supports skin hydration 6mg Lutein provides targeted eye protection 15mg Vitamin E enhances skin benefits 5mg Piperine maximizes absorption BENEFITS: Promotes radiant, youthful skin from within Supports eye health and reduces digital eye strain Provides powerful whole-body antioxidant protection Enhances energy levels and exercise recovery Supports cognitive function and mental clarity HOW TO USE Take two softgels daily with a meal containing healthy fats for optimal absorption. For enhanced skin protection during summer months, consider taking an additional softgel.
detail_html:
Astaxanthin VitaRadiance: Nature's Most Powerful Antioxidant

UNMATCHED ANTIOXIDANT PROTECTION

Astaxanthin is a rare and powerful carotenoid that can protect both water and fat-soluble portions of cells. Research shows it's up to 6,000 times more potent than vitamin C and can cross the blood-brain and blood-retinal barriers.

THE NUTRA ZENITH DIFFERENCE

While many competitors offer weak formulas (some containing less than 1mg despite label claims), our VitaRadiance delivers 15mg of laboratory-verified astaxanthin in each serving with Piperine to enhance absorption by up to 30%.

COMPREHENSIVE BEAUTY & WELLNESS FORMULA:

  1. 15mg Natural Astaxanthin from premium microalgae
  2. 100mg Omega-3 supports skin hydration
  3. 6mg Lutein provides targeted eye protection
  4. 15mg Vitamin E enhances skin benefits
  5. 5mg Piperine maximizes absorption

BENEFITS:

  1. Promotes radiant, youthful skin from within
  2. Supports eye health and reduces digital eye strain
  3. Provides powerful whole-body antioxidant protection
  4. Enhances energy levels and exercise recovery
  5. Supports cognitive function and mental clarity

HOW TO USE

 Take two softgels daily with a meal containing healthy fats for optimal absorption. For enhanced skin protection during summer months, consider taking an additional softgel.

UNMATCHED ANTIOXIDANT PROTECTION

Astaxanthin is a rare and powerful carotenoid that can protect both water and fat-soluble portions of cells. Research shows it's up to 6,000 times more potent than vitamin C and can cross the blood-brain and blood-retinal barriers.

THE NUTRA ZENITH DIFFERENCE

While many competitors offer weak formulas (some containing less than 1mg despite label claims), our VitaRadiance delivers 15mg of laboratory-verified astaxanthin in each serving with Piperine to enhance absorption by up to 30%.

COMPREHENSIVE BEAUTY & WELLNESS FORMULA:

  1. 15mg Natural Astaxanthin from premium microalgae
  2. 100mg Omega-3 supports skin hydration
  3. 6mg Lutein provides targeted eye protection
  4. 15mg Vitamin E enhances skin benefits
  5. 5mg Piperine maximizes absorption

BENEFITS:

  1. Promotes radiant, youthful skin from within
  2. Supports eye health and reduces digital eye strain
  3. Provides powerful whole-body antioxidant protection

product.highlights:
• VERIFIED 15MG POTENCY: Each serving delivers laboratory-verified 15mg of pure astaxanthin - significantly higher than most competitors. Studies show many products contain less than 1mg despite label claims.
  • SUPERIOR ABSORPTION FORMULA: Enhanced with 5mg Piperine to increase bioavailability by up to 30%, ensuring your body can fully utilize this powerful carotenoid for maximum benefits.
  • COMPLETE BEAUTY & WELLNESS BLEND: Contains Omega-3 (100mg), Lutein (6mg), and Vitamin E (15mg) for comprehensive support of skin radiance, eye health, and cellular protection.
  • POWERFUL ANTIOXIDANT PROTECTION: Astaxanthin is 6,000x more potent than Vitamin C and the only antioxidant that can protect both water and fat-soluble portions of cells for complete protection.
  • PREMIUM QUALITY GUARANTEE: 60-day supply of laboratory-verified astaxanthin manufactured in certified facilities (ISO 9001:2015, HACCP, GMP). Free from dairy, egg, soy, wheat, gluten, corn, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts.

title: Lutein & Zeaxanthin Supplement 8000 mg Eye Vitamins with Saffron for Adults Eye Health Supplement to Support Vision and Eyes
detail_text: Introducing our revolutionary Vision Fusion 6 Supplement, a comprehensive combination of eye vitamins Lutein and Zeaxanthin with Ashwagandha, Saffron Supplements, Green Tea Extract and Glucomannan, enriched with 6 potent ingredients. Experience the power of beta carotene lutein and zeaxanthin supplement, and more in one convenient formula. These lutein eye vitamins capsules provide a great alternative to lutein gummies, saffron gummies, ashwagandha gummies and other eye health gummies. Our advanced formula of lutein with zeaxanthin are natural eye supplements for adults, both women and men. Zoyava presents the world's most comprehensive 6-in-1 supplements for eye health that is from marigold extract. Vision Fusion 6 featuring natural lutein zeaxanthin, ashwagandha, saffron, green tea extract and glucomannan capsules giving you a comprehensive single-dose solution that you will ever need. Discover the ultimate and advanced eye and vision support you've been searching for. Zoyava presents the perfect combination of eye supplements lutein. Vision Fusion 6 offers 6 beneficial ingredients in a single dosage. Unleash the power of ashwagandha vitamin, glucomannan, lutein capsules, all conveniently packed into just one capsule. Finally, the convenience you've been waiting for—lutein and zeaxanthin from marigold extract, ashwagandha powder, glucomannan supplement. Packed with a potent blend of zeaxanthin plus lutein, glucomannan, ashwagandha capsules, green tea extract supplement, and saffron capsules that offers an abundance of benefits. Say goodbye to the clutter of countless supplements in your cabinet and make room for a single solution. Zoyava presents a groundbreaking 8-in-1 formula Nature's Synergy Solution. We take great pride in providing our customers with vetted and trusted ingredients. Our commitment to quality is evident in our offerings of authentic natural lutein, zeaxanthin, ashwagandha root, saffron extract, glucomannan and green tea supplements. Rest assured that our lutein and zeaxanthin supplements are meticulously formulated in a registered and certified facility right here in the USA. With our products, you won't find any unnecessary preservatives or fillers.

title: DAITEA Eye Vitamins Lutein, Zeaxanthin and Bilberry Extract - Supports Eye Strain, Healthy Vision - Lutein Mixed Capsules
detail_text: Who is suitable for taking lutein? 1. Office workers who often look at the computer at work 2. People who like to browse mobile phones, play mobile games, and watch TV series 3. Want to take care of the eyes of the elderly 4. People who don’t eat enough fruits and vegetables when ordering takeout 5. Other special conditions: such as easy exposure to sunlight or strong light feature: EYE SUPPORT & VISION VITAMINS: Our eye health supplements are carefully crafted by experts to ensure optimal eye health support. Contains clinically proven extracts of lutein (lutein) and zeaxanthin as well as vitamins C, E, B12, folate, zinc and copper Eye Health Support: As we age, it is crucial to take good care of our eyes. Our Areds2 formula helps support overall eye health, relieve eye fatigue, dry eye and blue light protection. All these benefits packed into 2 easy-to-take vegetarian caps Fights Eye Strain: B.L.U.E. research shows that the carotenoids in lutein have a positive impact on vision health, sleep quality, and may reduce occasional eye strain caused by long-term exposure to blue-light screens. Our formula contains all 3 macular carotenoids Optimum Lutein to Zeaxanthin Ratio: Lutein contains 20 mg of lutein and 4 mg of zeaxanthin in a well-studied ratio of 5:1. Great for supporting eye health, dry eye, and vision. Contains black pepper extract to enhance absorption
detail_html:
Who is suitable for taking lutein?

1. Office workers who often look at the computer at work

2. People who like to browse mobile phones, play mobile games, and watch TV series

3. Want to take care of the eyes of the elderly

4. People who don’t eat enough fruits and vegetables when ordering takeout

5. Other special conditions: such as easy exposure to sunlight or strong light

feature:

EYE SUPPORT & VISION VITAMINS: Our eye health supplements are carefully crafted by experts to ensure optimal eye health support. Contains clinically proven extracts of lutein (lutein) and zeaxanthin as well as vitamins C, E, B12, folate, zinc and copper

Eye Health Support: As we age, it is crucial to take good care of our eyes. Our Areds2 formula helps support overall eye health, relieve eye fatigue, dry eye and blue light protection. All these benefits packed into 2 easy-to-take vegetarian caps

Fights Eye Strain: B.L.U.E. research shows that the carotenoids in lutein have a positive impact on vision health, sleep quality, and may reduce occasional eye strain caused by long-term exposure to blue-light screens. Our formula contains all 3 macular carotenoids

Optimum Lutein to Zeaxanthin Ratio: Lutein contains 20 mg of lutein and 4 mg of zeaxanthin in a well-studied ratio of 5:1. Great for supporting eye health, dry eye, and vision. Contains black pepper extract to enhance absorption

【Supports your eyes】

*Supplements do not cure diseases.

Please take this medicine as a nutritional supplement after maintaining a healthy lifestyle such as eating and exercising.


・Uses Scandinavian bilberries rich in anthocyanin!

・Contains lutein, acai, maqui berry, megusurinoki, and 11 types of vitamins!

・Highly concentrated★Contains 100 times more concentrated bilberry!! Seriously developed by a pharmaceutical company! High quality supplements manufactured in domestic GMP certified factories

【how to eat】

As a dietary supplement, take two tablets a day with water or lukewarm water.

[Contents] 72g (200mg x 360 tablets)


Raw material name:

Bilberry extract powder, shark cartilage extract, lutein-containing marigold extract, acai extract powder, maqui berry extract powder, meguslinoki powder, eyebright extract powder, blackcurrant extract powder/crystalline cellulose, sucrose fatty acid ester, fine silicon dioxide , vegetable charcoal pigment, vitamin C, extracted vitamin E, niacin, calcium pantothenate, vitamin B1, vitamin B2, vitamin B6, vitamin A, folic acid, vitamin D, vitamin B12


Recommended for these people

・ Feeling vague and unclear on a daily basis

・Those who often use PCs, smartphones, etc.

・For those who want to easily try the popular bilberry.

・People who often work at a desk for long periods of time

・People who like driving and reading

・People who like driving and reading

Other special conditions: such as easy exposure to sunlight or strong light feature: EYE SUPPORT & VISION VITAMINS: Our eye health supplements are carefully crafted by experts to ensure optimal eye health support. Our supplements help support overall eye health, eye fatigue relief and blue light protection. Relieves eye fatigue: Research shows that the carotenoids in lutein have a positive impact on vision health, sleep quality, and can reduce eye fatigue that occasionally results from long-term exposure to blue-light screens. title: GreenKare Bright Eyes Eye Support with Lutein Bilberry & Blueberry Extract Dry Eyes Blue Light Protection Vision Support Macular & Retina Health 60 Veg Caps
detail_text: About GreenKare Bright Eyes GreenKare Bright Eyes is a premium botanical eye support formula developed to help nourish and protect your eyes in today's digital lifestyle. Combining Lutein with Bilberry, Blueberry, Cassia Seed, Chrysanthemum, Mulberry and Wolfberry, this comprehensive formula provides daily nutritional support for healthy vision, eye comfort and overall eye wellness. Whether you spend long hours using computers, mobile phones or other digital devices, your eyes are constantly exposed to blue light and environmental stress. GreenKare Bright Eyes is formulated to help support healthy visual function, provide antioxidant protection and maintain macular and retinal health for everyday eye care. Manufactured in Singapore under GMP standards, GreenKare Bright Eyes is suitable for daily use and comes in vegetarian capsules, making it an ideal choice for adults looking to support their eye health naturally. Product Highlights Premium 7-Ingredient Botanical Formula With Lutein, Bilberry & Blueberry Supports Healthy Vision Helps Maintain Macular & Retinal Health Antioxidant Support for Everyday Eye Care Made in Singapore GMP Manufactured Vegetarian Capsules Suitable for Daily Use

title: Elle 18 Eye drama Black Kajal 0.35g
detail_text: PRODUCT DESCRIPTION: Dramatic Eyes All Day Long The one-stroke kajal that goes well with all your dramas, the Elle 18 Eye Drama Kajal. Intense-black-kohled eyes, that last for 20 hours straight! A gorgeous formula that’s water-proof, smudge-proof and basically everyday-proof.The looks you carry oh-so-effortlessly, you apply effortlessly too. The Elle 18 Eye Drama Kajal’s is so smooth to use, it just hits different. Which makes it the perfect partner for all your experiments.Let’s day dream about all the looks you can create with this kajal. It’s water-proof which makes it perfect for that movie night look. It’s intensely black which makes your eyes talk at all those college party looks. And it’s smudge-proof which also makes it pop on your no-makeup makeup look. Elle 18 Eye Drama is gorgeous day in, day out.Here’s how to get the classic Elle 18 Look: Take your Elle 18 Eye Drama Kajal. Uncap the lid, and swipe it across your upper-lid or on your water line in one single stroke. That’s it. If you want those eyes to slay more, right where the line of your kajal ends, draw a small thunderbolt – you guessed it – in one single stroke. Let’s just say whatever the ask, the Elle 18 Eye Drama Kajal is always the answer. To get the complete Elle 18 look, check out the Elle 18 Liquid lipstick. ABOUT THIS ITEM: Dramatic eyes Lasts for 20 hours Smudgeproof kajal Intense black finish Water proof formula Single stroke finish

Direction for Use It is recommended that 1 to 2 drops of Eye Glo Moist be placed into each eye 3 to 4 times a day or as needed. To avoid contamination of your bottle of Eye Glo Moist eye drops, do not touch the tip of the container to any surface. Ingredients Hydroxypropylmethylcellulose 0.3%, Sorbic Acid 0.1%, EDTA 0.1% -Eye Glo Plus Eyes Drops is ophthalmic solution designed to comfort and cool eyes that are irritated or strained. It has mild antiseptic property means that suitable for treatment of mild inflammatory conditions of the eyes. Direction for Use 2 - 3 drops into each eye. 3 to 4 times daily or as needed. Discard contents 4 week after opening. Ingredients Distilled Witch Hazel 5% w/v, Boric Acid 1.3% w/v, Borax 0.3% w/v Caution If you experience severe eye pain, changes in vision, continued redness or irritation of the eyes, discontinue use and consult medical practitioner. detail_text: Highly recommended by MissTwelveDecember The massaging action can improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.The cooling sensation provided by the rollerball can instantly refresh tired and puffy eyes. Additionally, the targeted application of the serum ensures that the active ingredients penetrate deeply into the skin, delivering maximum results. - Tomato & Gluta Bright Eye Roller Serum Blended with Tomato extract that contains high concentration of Lycopene which acts as antioxidant to prevent premature wrinkles and revives exhausted under eye areas along with Glutathione that aims to illuminate dullness on dark circles for radiance. It also prevents wrinkles occurrence providing your skin with light quick absorbing and relaxing treatment every time you use for incomparable luminosity. -Aloe Vera & Fresh Collagen Eye Roller Serum is enriched with Aloe Vera and Collagen Serum, designed to eliminate dark circles and puffiness while revitalizing the delicate skin around your eyes. Perfect for daily use, it soothes and brightens your under-eye area. Combat eye bags, puffiness, and wrinkles with our under eye depuffer. This indispensable product targets dark circles, moisturizes, and promotes clearer, radiant skin. -5 HYA & Peptide Firming Eye Roller Serum Gives firm under eyes area and tightens sagging skin. Reduces dark rings and fresh up puffy and tired eyes. Hydrates under eye skin. How to use: Gently roll the serum under your eyes using circular motions to promote absorption and increase blood flow, reducing puffiness and enhancing skin brightness. Ensure the cap is tightly closed after each use to maintain serum efficacy. Made in Thailand 15g

title: The Ordinary Caffeine solution 5% EGCG Eye Cream&Serum 30ml Gift/Present
detail_text: The Ordinary [The Pretty] Directions: Massage a small amount onto the eye contour AM and PM. This light-textured formula contains an extremely high 5% concentration of caffeine, supplemented with highly-purified Epigallocatechin Gallatyl Glucoside (EGCG) from green tea leaves. Independent studies have shown that topical use of each of caffeine and EGCG can help reduce looks of puffiness and of dark circles in the eye contour. Additional studies have shown that caffeine can also reduce the appearance of cellulite. ----- Notes: 1. Hollowness in the eye contour as a result of structure of sub-dermal tissues like fat and bone can result in visible shadows under the eyes. This shadow, which is not to be mistaken for dark circles, cannot be addressed with topical skincare including this formula. 2. Fat deposits under the eye contour can create permanent puffiness in this area. This type of deposit cannot be improved with topical skincare, including this formula. 3. Supplied in UV-protective packaging as EGCG is sensitive to light. *The packaging of The Ordinary products is environmentally friendly and has no plastic packaging. There are minor flaws on the packaging, such as drip irrigation tilted 1-3 mm, plastic dropper slightly color difference, etc. But it does not affect the quality and use of the product ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Multi The Serum capacity | 1oz 30ml

brand.name: The Ordinary
brand.suggestion: More Skin Care from The Ordinary

product.desc:
The Ordinary [The Pretty]

Directions:

Massage a small amount onto the eye contour AM and PM.

This light-textured formula contains an extremely high 5% concentration of caffeine, supplemented with highly-purified Epigallocatechin Gallatyl Glucoside (EGCG) from green tea leaves.

Independent studies have shown that topical use of each of caffeine and EGCG can help reduce looks of puffiness and of dark circles in the eye contour.

Additional studies have shown that caffeine can also reduce the appearance of cellulite.

-----

Notes:

1. Hollowness in the eye contour as a result of structure of sub-dermal tissues like fat and bone can result in visible shadows under the eyes. This shadow, which is not to be mistaken for dark circles, cannot be addressed with topical skincare including this formula.

2. Fat deposits under the eye contour can create permanent puffiness in this area. This type of deposit cannot be improved with topical skincare, including this formula.

3. Supplied in UV-protective packaging as EGCG is sensitive to light.

*The packaging of The Ordinary products is environmentally friendly and has no plastic packaging. There are minor flaws on the packaging, such as drip irrigation tilted 1-3 mm, plastic dropper slightly color difference, etc. But it does not affect the quality and use of the product

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Multi The Serum capacity | 1oz 30ml

title: Totaria Eye Vitamins Lutein and Zeaxanthin for Adults, AREDS 2 Eye Vitamin and Mineral,-3, Bilberry Extract - Carotenoid Blend, Support Eye Health, Strain, Comfort & Hydration 120 Capsules
detail_text: Description: Product Name: Eye Vitamins Lutein and Zeaxanthin for Adults, AREDS 2 Eye Vitamin and Mineral, Omega-3, Bilberry Extract - Carotenoid Blend, Support Eye Health, Strain, Comfort & Hydration Brand name: Totaria Specification: 120pcs per bottle Shelf life: 2 years Features: ✅Eye Support Formula: Crafted with AREDS 2-inspired nutrients including lutein, zeaxanthin, and antioxidant vitamins A/C/E to help maintain healthy eyes and manage oxidative stressors from daily environmental factors. ✅Digital Comfort Blend: Features bilberry extract and grape seed extract with carotenoids that support eye comfort in blue light environments, while promoting natural moisture balance. ✅Hydration Support Complex: Combines omega-3s (DHA/EPA), taurine, and astaxanthin to help maintain tear film balance for ocnal dryness management related to modern lifestyles. ✅Nutrient Delivery System: Enhanced with CoQ10 and GABA to support healthy nutrient delivery to eye structures for sustained visual focus. ✅Antioxidant Synergy Matrix: Delivers 16 essential nutrients including zinc, selenium, and lycopene in precise ratios to support the eyes' antioxidant response to environmental factors. ✅Trusted Made in the USA: Totaria is committed to providing the highest quality products. Our formula is gluten-free, soy-free, and contains no common allergens. It is third-party lab tested and GMP certified to ensure purity and potency.
detail_html:
Description:


Product Name: Eye Vitamins Lutein and Zeaxanthin for Adults, AREDS 2 Eye Vitamin and Mineral, Omega-3, Bilberry Extract - Carotenoid Blend, Support Eye Health, Strain, Comfort & Hydration


Brand name: Totaria


Specification: 120pcs per bottle


Shelf life: 2 years


Features:


✅Eye Support Formula: Crafted with AREDS 2-inspired nutrients including lutein, zeaxanthin, and antioxidant vitamins A/C/E to help maintain healthy eyes and manage oxidative stressors from daily environmental factors.


✅Digital Comfort Blend: Features bilberry extract and grape seed extract with carotenoids that support eye comfort in blue light environments, while promoting natural moisture balance.


✅Hydration Support Complex: Combines omega-3s (DHA/EPA), taurine, and astaxanthin to help maintain tear film balance for ocnal dryness management related to modern lifestyles.


✅Nutrient Delivery System: Enhanced with CoQ10 and GABA to support healthy nutrient delivery to eye structures for sustained visual focus.


✅Antioxidant Synergy Matrix: Delivers 16 essential nutrients including zinc, selenium, and lycopene in precise ratios to support the eyes' antioxidant response to environmental factors.


✅Trusted Made in the USA: Totaria is committed to providing the highest quality products. Our formula is gluten-free, soy-free, and contains no common allergens. It is third-party lab tested and GMP certified to ensure purity and potency.

aiTexts: Goji Chrysanthemum Deer Eye Pills combine chrysanthemum, lycium, and dendrobium herbs to support eye health and relieve eye strain.
These natural supplements help protect, nourish, and improve vision while combating common eye ailments.

Facial cleansers (soaps, wipes, etc.) recommended for tough, hard-to-remove lines. - CONTAINS BEAUTY ESSENCE INGREDIENTS Hyaluronic Acid, Collagen, Rosehip Extract (Wild Rose Fruit Extract), Panthenol Kiss Me Heroine Make Smooth Liquid Eyeliner has a new and strong waterproof function, which can effectively act against tears, water, sweat or sebum on your face. The function is very long-lasting and has a precise contouring. The 0.1mm extreme fine point allows you draw precise and beautiful eyeliners every single time. It is an excellent all-around product in which the incredibly fine point can help you freely sketch an inner eyeliner, where the color is deep and black, brilliant and bright. The eye power can be immediately doubled. Kiss Me Smooth Liquid Eyeliner dries very quickly, so it can help you make a perfect look no matter how busy your mornings are. detail_html:
【Product】

【Country of Origin】

New super waterproof formula, Super-Keep Polymer, protects lines from tears/ perspiration/ water and oils for beautiful, long-lasting definition.

It is an excellent all-around product in which the incredibly fine point can help you freely sketch an inner eyeliner, where the color is deep and black, brilliant and bright. The eye power can be immediately doubled.

【HOW TO USE】

- Shake well before use with a cap tightly closed.

detail_html:
Crystal Eyes able to IMPROVE and PREVENT 11 types of EYE PROBLEMS

1) AMD Age Related Macular Degeneration

The eye macular degeneration is usually distortion of straight lines. This may progress to gradual loss of central vision. This may also cause dark and blurry images. People with poor macular health can cause oxidative stress within the retina, leading to a total loss of center vision.

2) Dryness Symptoms

A very common condition that is characterized by a disturbance of the tear film in our eye. This may cause the eye feeling uneasy all the time.

3) Cataracts Symptoms

A cataract is a clouding of the lens of the eye that can impair vision. More than half of the population in the world age 65 years old and above have cataracts.

4) Floaters Symptoms

Floaters are small moving spots that appear in your field of vision. They may be noticeable when you look at something bright, such as white paper or blue sky.

5) Glaucoma Symptoms

Open angle glaucoma is often called “the sneak thief of sight” because it has no symptoms until the significant vision loss has occurred. It develop slowly and sometimes without noticeable sight loss for many years.

6) Astigmatism Symptoms

The most common symptom is blurred or double vision from out eye. It’s also inability to see both near and distant without squinting and difficulty focusing or printed word and lines.

7) Lazy Eye Symptoms

Is a condition in children when vision does not develop in the eyes. If its left untreated, the child vision will never develop correctly in the eye.

8) Myopia Symptoms- Short Sightedness

Having difficulties reading road signs and seeing distant objects clearly, but will be able to see well for close-up tasks such as reading and computer use.

9) Presbyopia Symptoms

Its occurrence where vision become blurred, making it hard to focus. It is very common with age. With the loss of flexibility, your eyes are less able to adjust properly to focus near object.

10) Detached Retina Symptoms

This is cause by tear or hole in the retina. Having sudden decrease of your vision and seeing a gray curtain moving across your field of vision.

11) Night Blindness

Having difficulties seeing in the dark or in low light is one of the most common issues with night blindness, those who suffer night blindness will have difficulties to drive in the evening or at night.

product.desc:
Crystal Eyes able to IMPROVE and PREVENT 11 types of EYE PROBLEMS

1) AMD Age Related Macular Degeneration

The eye macular degeneration is usually distortion of straight lines. This may progress to gradual loss of central vision. This may also cause dark and blurry images. People with poor macular health can cause oxidative stress within the retina, leading to a total loss of center vision.

2) Dryness Symptoms

A very common condition that is characterized by a disturbance of the tear film in our eye. This may cause the eye feeling uneasy all the time.

3) Cataracts Symptoms

A cataract is a clouding of the lens of the eye that can impair vision. More than half of the population in the world age 65 years old and above have cataracts.

4) Floaters Symptoms

Floaters are small moving spots that appear in your field of vision. They may be noticeable when you look at something bright, such as white paper or blue sky.

5) Glaucoma Symptoms

Open angle glaucoma is often called “the sneak thief of sight” because it has no symptoms until the significant vision loss has occurred. It develop slowly and sometimes without noticeable sight loss for many years.

6) Astigmatism Symptoms

The most common symptom is blurred or double vision from out eye. It’s also inability to see both near and distant without squinting and difficulty focusing or printed word and lines.

7) Lazy Eye Symptoms

Is a condition in children when vision does not develop in the eyes. If its left untreated, the child vision will never develop correctly in the eye.

8) Myopia Symptoms- Short Sightedness

Having difficulties reading road signs and seeing distant objects clearly, but will be able to see well for close-up tasks such as reading and computer use.

9) Presbyopia Symptoms

Its occurrence where vision become blurred, making it hard to focus. It is very common with age. With the loss of flexibility, your eyes are less able to adjust properly to focus near object.

10) Detached Retina Symptoms

This is cause by tear or hole in the retina. Having sudden decrease of your vision and seeing a gray curtain moving across your field of vision.

11) Night Blindness

Having difficulties seeing in the dark or in low light is one of the most common issues with night blindness, those who suffer night blindness will have difficulties to drive in the evening or at night.

PM for more information ❤
